description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script which installs Docker via ci/docker_install.sh, installs Composer, copies a custom php.ini and runs composer install, and caches the vendor/ directory. Define four jobs named test:5.6, test:7.0, test:7.1 and test:7.2, each using the php:5.6, php:7.0, php:7.1 and php:7.2 Docker images respectively, all in the default test stage, and each executing phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml.dist. No additional artifacts or rules are required.
